discovery.summary: Pick-up run for the REMAINING work of the connection/agent split (feature 015). Slices 0-2 (model split Bot->Connection+Agent+AgentVersion, connection auth + (agent_id,match_id) turn resolution + agent_turn_token, sims->kind=bot agents + leaderboard) are ALREADY implemented, reviewed, and committed on this branch. This run covers slices 3-5: (3) restructure bots_* routes into /me/connections + /me/agents (connections_setup/credentials/lifecycle, agents_setup/lifecycle/status), a dedicated /me/agents/new create page, agent versioning (create/edit, freeze-on-play), connection_health, max_concurrent enforcement at join, detach-on-connection-delete + reattach, pending-connection flow, templates split connections/+agents/, and migrate web_player/web_viewer/web_support/admin_web/nav_context/auth; (4) rename runner scripts/agentludum_agent.py -> agentludum_connector.py + mcp_server X-Connection-Key naming + drop the MCP-direct connect path; (5) rename sweep (no Bot class, no /me/bots, never 'bot' for a user's player) + full preflight green (ruff + mypy app/ mcp_server/ + pytest -q). Full reviewed design in specs/015-connection-agent-split/.
non_goals: Slices 0-2 (model+schema, connection auth/turn-resolution, bots-as-agents) — already implemented and committed; do not redo.
Any multi-game / game #2 work beyond not hard-coding hoard-hurt-help.
acceptance_criteria: App imports cleanly; full preflight green (ruff + mypy app/ mcp_server/ + pytest -q), no suppressions.
/me/connections and /me/agents exist as separate pages; /me/agents/new is a dedicated create page; no /me/bots route and no Bot model class remain.
Deleting a connection detaches (not deletes) its agents; an agent's model/strategy edit forks a new AgentVersion; max_concurrent_games enforced at join.
Runner is agentludum_connector.py using sk_conn_ + X-Connection-Key; MCP-direct connect path removed; no user-facing copy calls a user's AI player a 'bot'.

token_usage.parse_error: no Codex token block found in stderr
